blockingIssues.description: Callback argument checking still accepts some void-valued non-callable expressions at handle_func registration sites because check_fn_args uses non-strict types_compatible and TVoid is treated as a wildcard, so rgoc can accept invalid handler registrations such as mux.handle_func("/items", println("oops")).

rejectedObservations.observation: The worker transcript showed implementation edits before tests despite a tests-first skill requirement.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: this appears to be a one-off skill-following discrepancy from a single review, not a validated systemic guidance gap requiring AGENTS or skill updates.

rejectedObservations.observation: Generated-Go verification commands were recorded without nix develop -c wrappers.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented: repository AGENTS.md already requires project commands to run through nix develop -c, so no new guidance update is needed.
